title: Custom trigger for new column created
excerpt: I would like to create a custom trigger for when a new column is created on a board.  What would I put in the subscribe url and unsubscribe url fields?

posts.author: LizHamilton (automations@industrialroofingscotland.co.uk )
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create a custom trigger for when a new column is created on a board. What would I put in the subscribe url and unsubscribe url fields?
